sections.label: Platform & Algorithm
sections.desc: Feature drops, ranking-signal shifts and ad-product changes across the major platforms

items.title: Sends and DM shares now a top ranking signal
items.summary: Mosseri confirms watch time, likes and sends are the three core signals, with sends driving unconnected reach. Carousels are getting a fresh distribution boost.

items.title: X Chat launches, Communities shuts down 30 May
items.summary: X spun out a standalone messaging app and is killing Communities, its main community tool. Plan migrations for any client groups living there.

items.title: AI Business Assistant opens to all advertisers globally
items.summary: Meta handed AI the keys to ad setup including Pixel config, and shipped a zero-code Conversions API setup. Less dev dependency, more automated targeting.

items.title: Dwell time drives reach, AI search goes global
items.summary: Posts that hold viewers 5 seconds plus get exponentially more reach. The feed has shifted toward an interest-graph hybrid rewarding text-first Creator Mode posts.

sections.label: Creator & Influencer
sections.desc: The creator economy, KOL strategy and what is working across SEA

items.title: Influencer marketing pivots to revenue-linked KPIs
items.summary: Success now rides on long-term creator partnerships over one-off posts, with measurement shifting from likes and impressions to business outcomes.

items.title: Xiaohongshu rises in Mandarin-speaking SG and MY
items.summary: RED is now a serious complement to TikTok and Instagram for Mandarin communities. A channel worth testing for relevant client segments.

items.title: Huggies wins big on micro-influencers
items.summary: Working with 350 micro-influencers across 1,000-plus pieces drove half of all campaign views and pushed costs down. Volume plus relevance beat one big name.

items.title: Wet n Wild challenge drives 1.5M UGC videos
items.summary: Custom audio with JVKE plus a Bella Poarch-led multi-creator challenge hit a 13.7 percent TopView engagement rate and a 9.6 percent awareness lift.

sections.label: Brand Campaigns & Craft
sections.desc: Standout creative and social-first work worth stealing structure from

items.title: Chili's fake payday-lender pop-up next to McDonald's
items.summary: A one-day guerrilla shop spoofing meal-cost financing pulled three-hour queues and over 6 billion impressions. Built around a real cost-of-living tension.

items.title: Dove takes Real Beauty to Reddit, criticism and all
items.summary: DAVID London ran testimonials inside Reddit's native format, folding in skepticism as proof rather than polish. Verification as a trust play in a low-trust feed.

items.title: Vaseline turns TikTok trend-monitoring into a campaign
items.summary: A 150-year-old brand built creative directly off social listening, reacting to what users were already saying. Among the year's strongest cultural-resonance plays.

items.title: Folgers remixes its jingle into a seven-song mashup
items.summary: BBH USA reframed a legacy morning ritual into an all-day cultural brand by blending wake-up anthems across genres and generations.

sections.label: Singapore / APAC
sections.desc: Regional brand, agency and platform moves on your doorstep

items.title: Campaign360 lands at Marina Bay Sands
items.summary: Two days on AI in creative workflows, fragmentation and measurement. The throughline: build distinctive memory structures when you only get 1.7 seconds of attention on mobile.

items.title: Singapore: 98.4% online, YouTube reach at 90.6%
items.summary: Near-total connectivity. TikTok and Meta Advantage+ drive the fastest social ad growth, and localising creative for CN, Malay, Tamil and EN segments is the performance edge.

items.title: Five APAC cause campaigns embed value over messaging
items.summary: Work across AU, ID, PH, SG and IN moved past hollow cause marketing. Indonesia's Wardah 'Hear in Hijab' brooch hearing aid was the standout for design-led impact.

items.title: Marketing-Interactive: the daily regional pulse
items.summary: Your fastest read on SG, MY, ID, PH, TH and HK agency and brand moves. Worth a standing daily scan for client-adjacent news.

sections.label: Malaysia
sections.desc: Platform behaviour, creator trends and brand work specific to the Malaysian market

items.title: WhatsApp closes the sale in Malaysia's 'Digital Trinity'
items.summary: Over 90 percent of local sales journeys involve a WhatsApp message before purchase. Winning brands split roles: Facebook for scale, TikTok for discovery, WhatsApp for conversion.

items.title: RED becomes a verification channel for Chinese-Malaysian buyers
items.summary: Xiaohongshu is now near-mandatory for reaching high-spending urban Malaysian Chinese consumers, and nano-KOLs deliver the best trust-to-cost ratio for SMEs.

items.title: Festive-calendar content beats generic global messaging
items.summary: Campaigns built around Ramadan, CNY, Deepavali, Merdeka and Malaysia Day consistently outperform. Bilingual captions and Bahasa Rojak lift relatability and click-through.

items.title: Jetour runs full-funnel market entry against Proton and Perodua
items.summary: The Chinese marque built credibility from zero awareness with a pre-launch lead-capture push across social, content, performance and PR. A useful playbook for new-entrant brands.

sections.label: Category Watch
sections.desc: Social moves in your clients' verticals: healthcare, automotive and luxury, gaming and tech, social good

items.title: Pharma to outspend linear TV on social for the first time
items.summary: eMarketer expects social to pass linear TV in pharma budgets. Reddit is one of the fastest-growing organic health categories at 48 percent year on year.

items.title: FDA ad crackdown set to extend to social and influencers
items.summary: After targeting TV first, regulators signalled tougher action on deceptive health promotion across social and influencer marketing. Build compliance into creator briefs now.

items.title: BMW launches luxury brand campaign on YouTube and IG
items.summary: A multi-channel push centred on performance and exclusivity for its top models, rolling out social-first before outdoor and TV. Useful reference for premium-tier social.

items.title: F1 keeps fuelling luxury-auto social conversation
items.summary: Ferrari and Hamilton, plus Audi's 2026 F1 entry, generate sustained brand chatter well beyond race weekends. Strategic athlete and motorsport ties create durable visibility.

sections.label: AI & Industry
sections.desc: The structural shifts reshaping how social and comms teams work

items.title: Global ad revenue projected up 8.8% in 2026
items.summary: Digital advertising and marketing spend is expected to reach 786.2 billion dollars. Growth is real, but the mix is shifting fast toward automated and AI-led buys.

items.title: AI is eroding the middle layers of marketing
items.summary: Agentic media planning and AI-generated campaign variants are compressing the work between brief and output faster than most leaders admit publicly.

items.title: 70% of consumers say AI-generated ads feel soulless
items.summary: As synthetic content floods feeds, human stories are becoming the scarcest creative asset. Authenticity is reading as the antidote, not a trend.

items.title: Google's Gemini Spark runs as a 24/7 background agent
items.summary: An always-on AI agent raises real governance questions for comms teams around oversight, approvals and brand safety. Worth a POV before clients ask.
